scripts.build:local-analytics: if [ -f src/environments/environment.local.ts ]; then NG_CLI_ANALYTICS=false ng build --configuration=production-local-analytics; else NG_CLI_ANALYTICS=false ng build; fi
scripts.preview:local-analytics: if [ -f src/environments/environment.local.ts ]; then NG_CLI_ANALYTICS=false ng serve --configuration=production-local-analytics; else NG_CLI_ANALYTICS=false ng serve --configuration=production; fi
